allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); sigs=d['signals']; bn=[s for s in sigs if 'BANKNIFTY' in s['instrument']]; ni=[s for s in sigs if 'NIFTY' in s['instrument'] and 'BANKNIFTY' not in s['instrument']]; print\(f'total={d[\\"count\\"]} BANKNIFTY={len\(bn\)} NIFTY={len\(ni\)}'\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) sigs = d['signals'] nopt = [s for s in sigs if s['instrument'].startswith\('NIFTY '\) and \('CE' in s['instrument'] or 'PE' in s['instrument']\)] strict = [s for s in sigs if s.get\('source'\) == 'nifty-strict'] oi = [s for s in sigs if s.get\('source'\) == 'oi-flow'] print\(f'total={d[\\"count\\"]} · NIFTY-options={len\(nopt\)} · strict={len\(strict\)} · oi-flow={len\(oi\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; [print\(json.dumps\({'type': j.get\('type'\), 'role': j.get\('message', {}\).get\('role'\), 'content': str\(j.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\)\)[:300]}, indent=2\)\) for j in \(json.loads\(l\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)\)]")
Bash(python3 -c 'import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d.get\('\\''signals'\\'',[]\); print\(f'\\''count={len\(s\)}'\\''\); *)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'count={d[\\"count\\"]} asOf={d[\\"asOf\\"]}'\); print\(json.dumps\(d['rows'][0], indent=2\)\) if d['rows'] else print\('no rows yet'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('movers:', d.get\('totalMovers'\), 'caught:', len\(d.get\('caught',[]\)\), 'missed:', len\(d.get\('missed',[]\)\)\); [print\(' ✓',r['symbol'], r['movePct'],'%','via',','.join\(r['caughtBy']\)\) for r in d.get\('caught',[]\)[:10]]; [print\(' ✗',r['symbol'], r['movePct'],'%'\) for r in d.get\('missed',[]\)[:10]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/bf.json'\)\); print\('movers:', d.get\('totalMovers'\), 'caught:', len\(d.get\('caught',[]\)\), 'missed:', len\(d.get\('missed',[]\)\)\); [print\(' ✓',r['symbol'], r['movePct'],'%','via',','.join\(r['caughtBy']\)\) for r in d.get\('caught',[]\)[:15]]; [print\(' ✗',r['symbol'], r['movePct'],'%'\) for r in d.get\('missed',[]\)[:15]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/bf3.json'\)\); print\('movers:', d.get\('totalMovers'\), 'caught:', len\(d.get\('caught',[]\)\), 'missed:', len\(d.get\('missed',[]\)\)\); [print\(' ✓',r['symbol'], r['movePct'],'% via',','.join\(r['caughtBy']\),'\(trig',r.get\('triggerCandle',{}\).get\('date',''\),'\)'\) for r in d.get\('caught',[]\)[:15]]; [print\(' ✗',r['symbol'], r['movePct'],'%'\) for r in d.get\('missed',[]\)[:15]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', d.get\('count'\), 'last close:', d['candles'][-1]['close'] if d.get\('candles'\) else 'NONE'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cs=d.get\('candles',[]\); print\('count:', d.get\('count'\), 'last close:', cs[-1]['close'] if cs else 'NONE'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/ts.json'\)\); print\('scanned:',d.get\('scanned'\),'qualified:',d.get\('qualified'\)\); [print\(' ', s['symbol'], s['timeframe'], s['direction'], 'entry',s['entry'],'sweep wick',s['sweepWickPrice'],'conf',s['confidence']\) for s in d.get\('signals',[]\)[:10]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/fl.json'\)\); print\('scanned:',d.get\('scanned'\),'qualified:',d.get\('qualified'\)\); [print\(' ', s['symbol'], s['timeframe'], s['direction'], 'fib',s['fibLevel'],'@',s['fibPrice'],'entry',s['entry'],'conf',s['confidence']\) for s in d.get\('signals',[]\)[:10]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/wp.json'\)\); print\('rows:',len\(d.get\('rows',[]\)\),'regime:',d.get\('regime'\)\); [print\(' ', r['symbol'], r['direction'], 'conv',r['conviction'],'src',r['source'],'entry',r['entryPrice'],'T1',r['target1'],'T2',r['target2'],'T3',r['target3']\) for r in d.get\('rows',[]\)[:15]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/wp.json'\)\); rows=d.get\('rows',[]\); cur=[r for r in rows if r['source']=='CURATED']; print\('curated count:',len\(cur\),'\\\\nTop curated:'\); [print\(' ', r['symbol'], r['direction'], 'conv',r['conviction'],'entry',r['entryPrice'],'T1',r['target1']\) for r in cur[:15]]")
